R1: executed_by(tree, 'scan customer against databases', 'system') and exists(tree, 'scan customer against databases')
R2: exists(tree, 'perform identity check') and send_exist(tree, 'identityCheckHistory')
R5: executed_by(tree, 'approve negative balance', 'bank manager') or condition_eventually_follows(tree, '(accountBalance <= 0) and (customerType == "VIP")', 'End Activity', scope='branch')
